title: 623<sup>rd</sup> Meeting of Central Board of the Reserve Bank of India
description: The 623rd meeting of the Central Board of Directors of Reserve Bank of India was held today in Mumbai under the Chairmanship of Shri Sanjay Malhotra, Governor. The Board reviewed the global and domestic economic scenario, including risks to the outlook. The Board deliberated on the annual accounts of the Reserve Bank for the FY 2025-26.
